ci_support_linux_64_.yaml:
channel_sources:
- conda-forge
channel_targets:
- conda-forge main
docker_image:
- quay.io/condaforge/linux-anvil-x86_64:alma9
python_min:
- '3.10'

about.description:
A fast, stdlib-only CLI that reports how much of a Python codebase is
actually type-checked by mypy. Enumerates fully-unannotated definitions
(whose bodies mypy silently skips under check_untyped_defs = False),
files excluded by the mypy `exclude` regex, and computes aggregate
coverage percentages. Ships a GitHub composite action and a JSON output
mode for CI integration.
about.summary: Report mypy annotation coverage for a Python codebase.

about.description:
A fast, stdlib-only CLI that reports how much of a Python codebase is
actually type-checked by mypy. Enumerates fully-unannotated definitions
(whose bodies mypy silently skips under check_untyped_defs = False),
files excluded by the mypy `exclude` regex, and computes aggregate
coverage percentages. Ships a GitHub composite action and a JSON output
mode for CI integration.
about.summary: Report mypy annotation coverage for a Python codebase.

name: mypy-coverage
raw_meta_yaml:
{% set name = "mypy-coverage" %}
{% set version = "0.2.3" %}
{% set python_min = "3.11" %}

package:
  name: {{ name|lower }}
  version: {{ version }}

source:
  url: https://pypi.org/packages/source/{{ name[0] }}/{{ name }}/mypy_coverage-{{ version }}.tar.gz
  sha256: 94ada086a0a6dcebf52e5d2606c7ad71ed961d480093ddc42f56801975f3268d

build:
  number: 0
  noarch: python
  script: {{ PYTHON }} -m pip install . -vv --no-deps --no-build-isolation
  entry_points:
    - mypy-coverage = mypy_coverage.cli:main_cli

requirements:
  host:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - hatchling >=1.21
    - pip
  run:
    - python >={{ python_min }}

test:
  imports:
    - mypy_coverage
  commands:
    - pip check
    - mypy-coverage --version
    - mypy-coverage --help
  requires:
    - python {{ python_min }}
    - pip

about:
  home: https://github.com/mfisherlevine/mypy_coverage
  summary: Report mypy annotation coverage for a Python codebase.
  description: |
    A fast, stdlib-only CLI that reports how much of a Python codebase is
    actually type-checked by mypy. Enumerates fully-unannotated definitions
    (whose bodies mypy silently skips under check_untyped_defs = False),
    files excluded by the mypy `exclude` regex, and computes aggregate
    coverage percentages. Ships a GitHub composite action and a JSON output
    mode for CI integration.
  license: GPL-3.0-or-later
  license_family: GPL3
  license_file: LICENSE
  doc_url: https://github.com/mfisherlevine/mypy_coverage#readme
  dev_url: https://github.com/mfisherlevine/mypy_coverage

extra:
  recipe-maintainers:
    - mfisherlevine
